name: Credix Credit Pool
fullName: Credix / CrediPay B2B Private Credit Pool
description: Credix is an institutional private-credit and B2B credit platform associated with CrediPay, a Brazil-focused BNPL solution for B2B sales. For Nexus RWA, this baseline treats Credix as a credit-pool / receivables exposure rather than a liquid direct-claim token. Verified on-chain pool contract and investor-token data were not found in public official sources, so token-specific fields remain null.

_meta.notes: Credix currently presents public documentation under CrediPay; legacy on-chain private-credit details are limited in official public docs.
